nasb.text: because I hear of your love and of the faith which you have toward the Lord Jesus and toward all the saints;

esv.text: because I hear of your love and of the faith that you have toward the Lord Jesus and for all the saints,

ccb.text: 因为我听说了你对主耶稣的信心和对众圣徒的爱心。

csbs.text: 因为我听说了你对主耶稣和所有圣徒所怀的爱心和信仰。
